## What this changes

Briefly describe the change and why.

Fixes #(issue number, if any)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes — including the full UAX #9 conformance suites (added/updated tests for this change)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies
- [ ] Public API changes have JSDoc + an `@example`
- [ ] Generated tables (`src/data/generated/`) were produced by `npm run generate-data`, not hand-edited
- [ ] For reordering/shaping changes: source cited (UAX #9 rule / Unicode core spec §9.2 / UCD)
